user_query:
I’m organizing my weekly follow-ups from my professor’s golden age of cinema anecdotes to keep my art practice on track. Using the files under input/, please do three things and save all outputs under the output/ directory:

1) Weekly reminder script and run:
- Implement a command-line script at scripts/weekly_reminder.py that reads input/followups.csv and prints only pending items due within a 7-day window starting on an anchor date.
- The script must accept an argument --as-of YYYY-MM-DD and compute the inclusive window [as-of, as-of+6 days].
- Output format (one item per line), sorted by due_date ascending: YYYY-MM-DD | Topic | Action | SourceNoteBasename
  Example line: 2026-05-02 | Italian Neorealism | Sketch a street scene capturing the tone of "Bicycle Thieves" | professor_notes_2026-03-12.md
- Run the script with: python3 scripts/weekly_reminder.py --as-of 2026-05-01 and redirect stdout to output/next_week_reminders.txt.

2) Draft a concise follow-up email to my professor at output/email_to_professor.md with:
- First line: Subject: Follow-up on golden age cinema anecdotes and art progress
- Greeting: Dear Professor Rivera,
- Two short paragraphs summarizing my progress that reference at least two specific concepts from the notes (e.g., Italian Neorealism, deep focus, German Expressionism, Kammerspielfilm, Soviet Montage, French Poetic Realism, or RKO lighting).
- A bullet list of exactly three follow-up questions, each tied to one of the provided note files by date (e.g., “On 2026-03-12: …”).
- A closing proposing two 30–60 minute meeting options between 2026-05-05 and 2026-05-14.

3) Compose a status summary at output/inspiration_progress.md that includes:
- Themes from Professor’s Stories: 3–5 bullet points of distinct themes extracted from the note files, each bullet referencing the note filename and date.
- Follow-up Status Summary (computed from input/followups.csv as-of 2026-05-01):
  - Total pending count
  - Total done count
  - Overdue (pending items with due_date < 2026-05-01): list each as YYYY-MM-DD – Topic – id
  - Upcoming within 7 days count (2026-05-01 through 2026-05-07 inclusive)
- Cross-check: The “Upcoming within 7 days” count must exactly match the number of lines in output/next_week_reminders.txt.

Inputs you must use:
- input/followups.csv (schedule of follow-ups)
- input/notes/professor_notes_2026-03-12.md and input/notes/professor_notes_2026-03-19.md (story notes to extract themes and references)

Deliverables to produce:
- scripts/weekly_reminder.py (the CLI reminder script)
- output/next_week_reminders.txt (generated by running the script with --as-of 2026-05-01)
- output/email_to_professor.md (email draft)
- output/inspiration_progress.md (status summary)

Please ensure counts and dates are derived from the CSV, references to the notes match the provided files, and that the script’s output lines use the specified format with the note’s basename. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
